problem: TOC tracker exhibits drift or clicks fail when DistractionFree mode is false.
cause: TOC is generated statically from full MDX, but in preview mode, subsequent headings are unmounted.
successful_fix: Graceful failure on click. Allow active tracker to ignore missing DOM nodes.
prevention: Do not force hydration or throw errors if a hash route attempts to locate a missing node in preview mode.

problem: TOC picks up comments from MDX code blocks as headings if they start with # at the beginning of a line.
cause: Raw markdown regex matched headings in python or shell code blocks since they start with # at start of line.
successful_fix: Strip code blocks from markdown content before extracting headings in lib/toc.ts.
prevention: Always clean the raw markdown text of non-content blocks (e.g. code blocks) before executing regex-based layout or metadata extraction.
